chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-1509 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A. 7218/2024 2. For orders on office objection 3. For orders on M.A. 7219/2024 4. For hearing of main case 15.10.2024 Mr. Muhammad Waseem Jamali advocate for Petitioner. 1. Granted. 2to4. Contended that Respondent No.7 is interfering in the litigation of Petitioner with his other opponents, taking undue advantage of her political position. The prayer clause of the Petition has been perused which is not maintainable, inter alia, owing to the fact that already F.C. Suit No.176/2023 is pending. All the grievances can be agitated in the same proceedings so also the Petitioner has other remedy available. Consequently, this Petition is dismissed. However, Petitioner may avail remedy in accordance with law. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
